home.title: CrabWatch Malaysia
home.subtitle: A citizen science platform for crab conservation. Help protect Malaysia's crab populations by contributing your observations.

contribute.description: Your data helps scientists understand and protect crab populations

capture.title: Capture Observation
capture.subtitle: Take photos of a crab with a coin for size reference

instructions.dorsal: Place the crab on a flat surface. Position the coin next to it. Take a clear top-down photo.
instructions.ventral: Gently flip the crab over. Keep the coin in frame. Take a clear photo of the underside.
instructions.closeUp: Take a close-up of any distinctive features (claws, markings, etc.)

photoGuidance.ensureClear: Ensure the photo is clear and well-lit
photoGuidance.includeFullCrab: Include the full crab in frame

hero.title: CrabWatch Malaysia
hero.description: Protecting Malaysia's crab populations through community-driven science. We empower fishers, divers, and nature enthusiasts to become citizen scientists, collecting vital data that informs conservation policy and sustainable fisheries management.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Malaysia is home to diverse crab species including mud crabs, swimming crabs, and hermit crabs across mangrove, coastal, and marine habitats. Overfishing, habitat loss, and climate change threaten these populations. CrabWatch bridges the gap between local communities and marine scientists by creating an accessible platform for data collection, analysis, and conservation action.

feature1.title: Observation Tracking
feature1.description: Record crab sightings with species, size, weight, and location data. Every observation contributes to a growing scientific dataset.

feature2.title: Interactive Mapping
feature2.description: Visualize observation hotspots across Malaysia with our interactive map. Identify patterns in crab distribution and habitat preferences.

feature3.title: Data Analytics
feature3.description: Access population analytics including size-frequency distributions, gender ratios, maturity indices, and temporal trends across all tracked species.

feature4.title: Community Validation
feature4.description: A two-tier review system where researchers validate citizen-submitted observations, ensuring data quality for scientific use.

cta.title: Get Involved
cta.description: Whether you're a fisherman, a recreational diver, or a marine biology student, your observations matter. Join our community of citizen scientists and help protect Malaysia's crab populations.

publicAbout.footer: CrabWatch Malaysia - Citizen Science for Crab Conservation

about.title: About CrabWatch
about.description: CrabWatch is a citizen science platform for crab conservation in Malaysia. Our mission is to engage the public in monitoring crab populations through AI-assisted observation capture.
about.aiDetectionDesc: Advanced AI identifies crab species from photos dynamically
about.gamificationDesc: Earn XP, level up, and compete on the leaderboard
about.analyticsDesc: Visualize population trends and distribution data
about.researchDesc: Expert review ensures data quality and accuracy
